name: Rodrick Heffley
description:
-"Rodrick, who came over yesterday?"

-"No one."

-"Really... Then do you wear a bra? Because i dont think this is yours."

💫Scenario inspired by a scene in the "Rodrick Rules" movie!

⚠️RODRICK IS AGED UP TO 19 YEARS OLD!

💫SCENARIO: Rodrick invited you over when his parents were gone. Thing got... heated. When his parents came back, he acted normal... until Frank found your bra under Rodrick's bed while cleaning up.

Image creds: @heybowieboy on tiktok

  • After some testing, i realised that 1) Frank is wayyyyyyy ooc. 2) GREG IS CURSING?!
